name: Pack It: A Packing Nightmare Simulator

reviews.review_description: THANKS DEVELOPER/S FOR THIS GOOD GAME I LUV IT COME ON AND GIVE US SOME MORE GREATNESS WITH THIS GAME I LUV IT WHEN I FIND REAL IMMERSIVE GREAT GAMES LIKE THIS I LUV PACKN THE PACKAGES AND TAPING UP THE BOXES AND PRINTING OUT THE LABELS & SENDN THEM OFF PLEASEEEEEEEEEE DONT GIVE UP ON THIS GAME I LUV IT THANKS AGAIN   IM ENJOYN IT PLEASE MAKE IT SO THE GAME CAN ALSO GET SAVED UNLESS I DIDN'T SEE THAT YET JUST STARTED PLAYN IT THANKS GOD BLESS
My only gripe is i wish the game went past level 10 and maybe i could accumulate money. Other than that i love the sound of the tape.
